site.hero_headline_html:
I turn messy user problems
into structured product direction.
site.hero_copy: Product-focused program and platform leader with experience designing loyalty, rewards, and engagement ecosystems across dealers, retailers, farmers, and influencers. I bring business depth, user-centric thinking, and strong cross-functional execution across technology, operations, finance, client stakeholders, and external vendors.

projects.title: Improving Engagement & Retention in Zomato Food Delivery
projects.summary: A strategy-led case on retention in Tier-1 food delivery. I used first-principles diagnosis, behavior-led framing, metric hierarchy, and solution logic to identify where habit formation could be strengthened.
projects.highlight: This shows how I break a broad consumer problem into structured product thinking with a clear objective and measurable direction.

projects.title: VitaFit Retention & Engagement Strategy
projects.summary: A product strategy and execution-oriented case focused on improving user momentum in a fitness experience. The work translates retention challenges into concrete signals, nudges, and build-ready thinking.
projects.highlight: This reflects my comfort moving from problem framing into actionable product artifacts and execution logic.

projects.title: Nourishly — Smarter Weekly Meal Planning
projects.summary: An Indian-first product concept focused on solving the real friction behind meal planning: decision fatigue, household complexity, and execution overload. The idea is shaped as a decision system, not just a recipe library.
projects.highlight: This demonstrates 0→1 thinking, sharper problem definition, and the ability to identify the true job to be done.

projects.title: WhatsApp-Led Local Service Discovery
projects.summary: A research-led exploration of how people discover local services, where trust breaks, and how WhatsApp could evolve into a more structured discovery layer without becoming a heavyweight marketplace.
projects.highlight: This shows my ability to synthesize research into product direction and define where a product should play in an ecosystem.
